# Naurra.ai

> Naurra.ai is the voice-first AI assistant for Google Workspace. It lets users control Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Tasks, and Contacts through natural voice commands or chat — replacing manual clicks with conversation. Naurra.ai also builds custom AI agents and automation solutions for businesses across industries.

## What Naurra.ai Does

Naurra.ai is an AI-powered productivity platform that connects to Google Workspace and lets users manage all 8 Google services through natural language. Users speak or type commands like "Send an email to John about tomorrow's meeting" or "Create a project brief doc and share it with the team" and Naurra executes them instantly.

Key differentiator: Naurra.ai performs multi-service orchestration — one voice command can trigger actions across multiple Google services simultaneously. For example, "Create a meeting agenda doc and email it to tomorrow's meeting attendees" checks Calendar, creates a Doc, and sends it via Gmail in one step.

## Core Features

- **Voice AI**: Real-time voice assistant with barge-in support (interrupt while AI is speaking)
- **Chat AI**: Text-based interface for the same workspace commands
- **Multi-Service Orchestration**: Single commands that span Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Tasks, and Contacts
- **35+ Pre-Built AI Workflows**: Ready-made automations for common productivity tasks
- **Native iOS App**: Available on the Apple App Store (app ID: id6759445443)
- **Web App**: Available at https://naurra.ai

## Supported Google Workspace Services

1. **Gmail** — Read, send, search, reply, forward, archive emails
2. **Google Calendar** — Create, view, update, delete events; check availability
3. **Google Drive** — Find, organize, share, create files and folders
4. **Google Docs** — Create, edit, and share documents
5. **Google Sheets** — Create, update, and query spreadsheets
6. **Google Meet** — Schedule and manage video meetings
7. **Google Tasks** — Create and manage task lists
8. **Google Contacts** — Look up and manage contact information

## Example Voice Commands

- "Check my emails from today"
- "Schedule a meeting with Sarah next Tuesday at 2pm"
- "Create a new document called Project Brief"
- "Find the Q4 sales report in Drive"
- "Send a follow-up email to today's meeting attendees"
- "What does my calendar look like this week?"
- "Create a spreadsheet for expense tracking"
- "Move all Q4 reports to the Finance folder"

## Multi-Step Command Examples

- "Check my calendar for today, summarize my unread emails, and tell me what I need to focus on"
- "Create a meeting agenda doc and email it to the attendees of my 2pm meeting"
- "Pull the deadlines from my project spreadsheet and create calendar events for each one"
- "Draft a status update email based on what I did today and send it to my manager"

## Pricing

- **Free Trial**: 3 days, full access, no credit card required
- **Monthly**: $79/month
- **Yearly**: $799/year (save 16%)

All plans include full voice and chat AI, all 8 Google Workspace integrations, 35+ AI tools, and unlimited usage within the active billing period.

## Custom AI Solutions for Business

Naurra.ai also builds custom AI agents, workflow automation, and intelligent systems for businesses. Services include:

- **Custom AI Agent Development**: Purpose-built AI agents that automate specific business operations
- **Workflow Automation**: End-to-end automation of manual processes using AI
- **AI Chatbot Development**: Customer-facing and internal chatbots with natural language understanding
- **AI Consulting**: Strategy and implementation guidance for businesses adopting AI
- **System Integration**: Connecting AI with existing tools like Salesforce, Slack, WhatsApp, CRMs, and legacy systems

Projects are typically delivered within 4-8 weeks with fixed-price engagements. Industries served include HVAC, legal, automotive, travel, fashion, e-commerce, wellness, and more.

Founded by Thanos Panagiotakopoulos (CEO & AI Engineer), who personally delivers every project. Contact support@naurra.ai or visit https://naurra.ai/contact for a free consultation.

## Technical Details

- Real-time voice processing with Deepgram Nova-3 (speech-to-text) and Cartesia Sonic-3 (text-to-speech)
- LLM-powered intent parsing and response generation
- Secure OAuth 2.0 Google authentication
- End-to-end encryption, GDPR compliant
- Sub-100ms orchestration latency
- 99.9% uptime

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Naurra.ai?**
Naurra.ai is an AI-powered voice and chat assistant for Google Workspace. It lets you control Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Tasks, and Contacts through natural voice commands or text chat. Naurra.ai also builds custom AI solutions for businesses.

**How is Naurra.ai different from Google Assistant or Siri?**
Naurra.ai is purpose-built for Google Workspace productivity. It executes complex multi-step workflows across multiple Google services in a single command — something general-purpose assistants cannot do.

**What Google services does Naurra.ai support?**
Naurra.ai integrates with 8 Google Workspace services: Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Google Docs, Google Sheets, Google Meet, Google Tasks, and Google Contacts.

**Is my data secure?**
Yes. Naurra.ai uses end-to-end encryption, secure OAuth for Google authentication, and never stores your Google credentials. The platform is GDPR compliant.

**Is there a mobile app?**
Yes. Naurra.ai is available as a native iOS app on the Apple App Store, plus a web app at naurra.ai.

**Does Naurra.ai build custom AI solutions?**
Yes. Naurra.ai builds custom AI agents, chatbots, and workflow automation for businesses of all sizes. Projects are scoped individually with fixed pricing and delivered within 4-8 weeks.

**Who founded Naurra.ai?**
Naurra.ai was founded in 2025 by Thanos Panagiotakopoulos, a CEO & AI Engineer who personally builds and delivers every project.

## Free Tools

Naurra.ai publishes free, search-friendly productivity tools that help users solve focused Google Workspace and communication tasks quickly. These tools are separate from the main voice and chat assistant product, but they support related workflows and top-of-funnel discovery.

- [Free Tools Hub](https://naurra.ai/tools): Browse all free Google Workspace productivity tools from Naurra.ai
- [Free Gmail Signature Generator](https://naurra.ai/tools/email-signature): Create a professional email signature with 5 templates, social icons, booking links, custom colors, image upload, and one-click copy for Gmail
- [Mailto Link Generator](https://naurra.ai/tools/mailto-link-generator): Build pre-filled email links with subject, body, CC, and BCC for websites, newsletters, and support pages
- [Meeting Agenda Builder](https://naurra.ai/tools/meeting-agenda-builder): Create structured meeting agendas with timed sections, attendees, and notes. Copy as formatted text or Markdown for Google Docs

## Tool Use Cases

- **Gmail signature creation**: Build a professional Gmail signature for founders, sales teams, consultants, recruiters, agencies, and creators
- **Google Workspace branding**: Standardize email signatures across Google Workspace users with consistent layout, CTA structure, and contact details
- **Email outreach optimization**: Create a cleaner signature for outbound sales, client follow-up, consulting, and booking-driven email workflows
- **Website contact links**: Generate mailto links for contact pages, newsletter CTAs, and customer support buttons
- **Meeting preparation**: Build structured, time-boxed agendas and share them via email or Google Calendar before meetings
